Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 86 

UNK_ELGBLTY_GRP_POP_IND 

LABEL: Eligible Population Indicator: Unknown Eligibility Group — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates if the managed care entity is associated with an unknown eligibility group; ever in the 
calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: UNK_ELGBLTY_GRP_POP_IND 

LONG NAME: UNK_ELGBLTY_GRP_POP_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual
